neqsim.process.synthesis.CompressionDuty

Package
Description
neqsim.process.synthesis
 

  • Uses of CompressionDuty in neqsim.process.synthesis

    Methods in neqsim.process.synthesis that return CompressionDuty
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    CompressionDuty
    CompressionDuty.setAfterCooler(boolean enabled, double tC)
    Configures whether a final after-cooler is added downstream of the last stage and at what temperature.
    CompressionDuty
    CompressionDuty.setInterstageCoolerTemperatureC(double tC)
    Sets the inter-stage cooler outlet temperature in degrees Celsius.
    CompressionDuty
    CompressionDuty.setMaxStageRatio(double ratio)
    Sets the maximum per-stage pressure ratio.
    CompressionDuty
    CompressionDuty.setPolytropicEfficiency(double eta)
    Sets the polytropic efficiency of each compression stage.
    Methods in neqsim.process.synthesis with parameters of type CompressionDuty
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    CompressionProposal
    FlowsheetSynthesisEngine.proposeAndBuildCompression(CompressionDuty duty)
    Builds and returns a CompressionProposal for the given CompressionDuty.
